The PPUD reports used for population reconstruction and movements after 31 Dec have the common logical set up below:

1 (       
2  DA Status = Active                     AND    
3  (       
4   Date of Hospital Order <= 31 Dec 2023  OR    
5   (       
6    Date of Hospital Order IS NULL N/A   AND    
7    Date Received in MHU <= 31 Dec 2023  AND    
8   )       AND    
9  )        AND    
10 )         OR

11 (       
12  DA Status != Active                   AND    
13  (       
14   End Date > 31 Dec 2023                OR    
15   (       
16    End Date IS NULL N/A                AND    
17    Expiry Date > 31 Dec 2023           AND    
18   )                                    AND    
19  )                                     AND    
20 )                                      AND
